data.name: mediatype.header.info
data.value: Select a media type in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new media type. Please note: System provided media types and user created media types associated to a billing tier cannot be deleted.

data.name: billingtier.header.info
data.value: Select a billing tier in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new billing tier.

data.name: feetype.header.info
data.value: Select a fee type in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new fee type. Please note: User created fee types associated to a billing template cannot be deleted.

data.name: invalidDiscDevice.dialogTitle.DialogUI
data.value: Write to Disc Cannot be Completed

data.name: invalidDir.dialogTitle.DialogUI
data.value: Save as File Cannot be Completed

data.name: deliverymethod.header.info
data.value: Select a delivery method in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new delivery method.

data.name: paymentmethod.header.info
data.value: Select a payment method in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new payment method.

data.name: pageweight.header.info
data.value: Modify the number of pages that it takes to equal 1 ounce.

data.name: invoicedue.header.info
data.value: Modify the number of days the payment is due upon invoice generation

data.name: invoicedue.header.title
data.value: Billing Maintenance: Configure Invoice Due Days

data.name: billingtemplate.header.info
data.value: Select a billing template in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new billing template.

data.name: adjustmentreason.header.info
data.value: Select an adjustment reason in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new adjustment reason.

data.name: statusreason.header.info
data.value: Select a status reason in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new request status reason.

data.name: requestreason.header.info
data.value: Select a request reason in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new request reason.

data.name: findrequestor.header.info
data.value: To find a requestor, enter search criteria in the fields below and click the Find Requestor button. Requestor search fields require at least 2 characters and Patient Search Fields require at least 3 characters to perform a search. The patient specific fields may only be used when searching by requestor type Patient or All (in which case both patient and non-patient requestors will be retrieved.) Select New Requestor to create a new Requestor.

data.name: requestorinfo.header.info
data.value: Review and modify requestor's information. Click Save Changes to store any changes for this requestor. Click Revert to discard any changes since the last save.

data.name: requestortype.header.info
data.value: Select a requestor type in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new requestor type.

data.name: discdoctypes.header.info
data.value: To make a document type a disclosure document, check the Disclosure checkbox. To make a document type an authorization request, check the Auth Request checkbox. There can only be one authorization request per code set. Select the Meaningful Use Document Type from the dropdown for each Document.

data.name: noDocument.DisclosureDocTypesListUI
data.value: There are no active document types for this code set. Please contact your System Administrator.

data.name: lettertemplate.header.info
data.value: Select a letter template in the list below to view, edit, or delete. Select the "Create New" button to create a new letter template. Select the "Download" button to download the file.

data.name: patientInfo.header.info
data.value: Review and modify the patient's information. Click Save Changes to store any changes for this patient. Click Revert to discard any changes since the last save.

data.name: findPatient.header.info
data.value: To find a patient, enter search criteria into the fields below and click the Find Patient button. To add a patient, click the New Patient button. Search fields require at least three characters except first and last name which require a minimum combination of 3 characters.

data.name: messageLabel
data.value: Select the requestor from list below by double-clicking or by clicking the View / Edit Requestor button.

data.name: searchCountLabel.morePatientFound
data.value: More than 500 patients found. Only the first 500 will display. Narrow the results by changing the filter criteria and searching again.

data.name: searchCountLabel.noPatientFound
data.value: No results found matching the selected criteria.

data.name: searchCountLabel.moreRequestorFound
data.value: More than 500 requestors found. Only the first 500 will display. Narrow the results by changing the filter criteria and searching again.

data.name: searchCountLabel.norequestorFound
data.value: No results found matching the selected criteria.

data.name: messagePatientLabel
data.value: Select a patient from the list below by double-clicking or by clicking the View / Edit Patient button.

data.name: patientrecords.header.info
data.value: Review the patient's records. Click the Set/Update button to filter the requests by selected encounters.

data.name: nonhpfdocument.create.header.info
data.value: To create a Non-MPF document all required fields must contain a value other than “Select.” A facility must be selected before a department can be chosen. Optionally enter an Encounter or Account Number and comment and click Save.

data.name: nonhpfdocument.edit.header.info
data.value: To edit a Non-MPF document, update the encounter or account number, document type, date of service, facility, department and/or comments. Click Save to save any changes.

data.name: encounterFilter.header.info
data.value: Select encounters by clicking the check mark next to the desired encounter in the grid below. Then click the Filter By Encounters button. Click Turn Off Filter button to clear any encounter filtering or click Cancel to leave the encounter filter unchanged.

data.name: deficiencyDialog.header.info
data.value: Below is a list of all deficiencies for the selected encounter.

data.name: requestcomment.header.info
data.value: All comments that have been entered for this request are displayed below. Use the filters if you wish to narrow the comments displayed. To enter a new comment, type it in the editable field below and click save. Click cancel if you do not want to save the newly entered comment.

data.name: requestinfo.header.editinfo
data.value: Review and/or modify information pertaining to this request.

data.name: selectrequestor.header.info
data.value: Find a requestor by performing a search. Once you have found a requestor and have determined you have chosen the correct requestor, click the Select Requestor for Request button. Click Cancel if you wish to return to the request without selecting a requestor. Please note: A new request cannot be saved without a requestor.

data.name: changerequeststatus.header.info
data.value: Review and/or modify the status information for the selected request. Some statuses require a reason to be entered when selected. More than 1 reason can be entered for any status. Predefined reasons, if created, may vary based on status selected.

data.name: changerequeststatus.header.title
data.value: Update Status Information for this Request

data.name: savenewpatientrequestor.header.info
data.value: You elected to create a new request with a patient requesting, but a matching patient requestor was not found. Review and/or modify the selected patient's information below that has been pre-populated. Once you have completed all required fields and determined the patient requestor information is correct, select Save New Requestor to proceed with creating the request. Otherwise select Cancel to end the creation of this new request and return to the Patients tab.

data.name: savenewpatientrequestor.header.title
data.value: Save New Patient Requestor to Continue Creating New Request

data.name: countLabel.PatientMatchingUI
data.value: {0} Patient(s) Found Matching the Selected Patient Requestor

data.name: extraInfoLabel
data.value: Please select the patient record(s) matching the selected patient requestor you wish to add to the request.

data.name: patientMatching.header.info
data.value: You have opted to create a new request with the selected patient requestor. In order to proceed, select the patient record(s) that match the selected patient requestor. Once selected, you will be taken to the Requests tab and a new request will be created with the selected patient requestor and selected patient(s) added to the request. You will be able to modify both the requestor’s information and the patient records for the request if you need to make further changes. If you do not wish to proceed, select Cancel to return to the Patients tab.

data.name: patientMatching.header.title
data.value: Create a New Request with Patients Found Matching the Selected Patient Requestor

data.name: requestinfo.header.newinfo
data.value: Begin creating a new request by entering all required information and clicking the Save button

data.name: selectpatient.header.info
data.value: You have opted to create a new request with the a patient requestor. In order to proceed, select the patient record(s) that match the selected patient requestor. If desired, select patient record(s) to add to the request and select the Continue with Selected Patient(s) button. You will be able to modify the patient records for the request if you need to make further changes. Select the Cancel button if you do not want to proceed.

data.name: selectpatient.header.title
data.value: Select Patient Found Matching the Selected Patient Requestor

data.name: countLabel.matchingRequestor
data.value: {0} Requestor found matching the selected patient.

data.name: countLabel.matchingRequestors
data.value: {0} Requestors found matching the selected patient.

data.name: countLabel.PotentialMismatchPatient
data.value: {0} Patient Selected for this Request with Patient Requestor

data.name: countLabel.PotentialMismatchPatients
data.value: {0} Patients Selected for this Request with Patient Requestor

data.name: infoText.MatchingRequestorUI
data.value: Please Note: If you mistakenly select the wrong patient requestor, you will be able to change the requestor on the request.

data.name: infoText.NoMatchingRequestorUI
data.value: No Requestor found matching the select patient. Please select which patient record you wish to use as the Patient Requestor.

data.name: matchingRequestorUI.header.info
data.value: You have opted to create a new request with the selected patient requesting their records. In order to proceed, you must select a matching requestor for the selected patient. Below are requestor matches the system has found for the selected patient. Please select the requestor that matches your patient to start the creation of this new request. If the requestor(s) displayed does not match your patient, please select the New Requestor button to create this patient as a requestor.

data.name: matchingRequestorUI.header.title
data.value: Create a New Request with the Selected Patient Requesting

data.name: matchingRequestorUI.titlebar.title
data.value: Create New Request with Patient Requesting

data.name: matchingRequstorInfoLabel
data.value: Please Note: If you mistakenly select the wrong patient requestor, you will be able to change the requestor on the request.

data.name: noMatchingRequestor.header.info
data.value: You have opted to create a new request with the selected patient requesting their records. In order to proceed, you must select a matching requestor for the selected patient. Unfortunately the system was unable to find a requestor match for the selected patient. To continue creating this request, select the Select Patient as Requestor button and the system will insert the applicable information from the selected patient as the requestor. You will be able to update this information for the patient requestor on the Request. If you do not wish to proceed, select Cancel to return to the Patients tab.

data.name: noMatchingRequestor.header.title
data.value: Create a New Request with the Selected Patient Requesting

data.name: patientMismatchInfoLabel
data.value: Verify the selected patients are the same patient to continue with the request.

data.name: MismatchPatientUI.header.info
data.value: Patient(s) were selected for a patient requestor. Some of the selected patient records do not appear to match. Please review the patient records and verify which patient records to use for the request.

data.name: MismatchPatientUI.header.title
data.value: Potential Patient Mismatch with Patient Requestor

data.name: title.MatchingRequestorUI
data.value: Create New Request with Patient Requesting

data.name: title.NoMatchingRequestorUI
data.value: Create New Request with Patient Requesting

data.name: noMatchingRequestor.titlebar.title
data.value: Create New Request with Patient Requesting

data.name: noMatchingRequestor.info
data.value: No Requestor found matching the select patient. Please select which patient record you wish to use as the Patient Requestor.

data.name: request.patientinfo.header.editinfo
data.value: Review and/or modify the patients and documents selected for this request. If documents have been released, they will appear in green. Previously released documents can not be removed from the request, but can be selected to be released again.

data.name: request.patientinfo.header.newinfo
data.value: Complete creating a new request by entering all required information and clicking the Save or Save and Bill button.

data.name: dsrTreeInfoLabel
data.value: Note:Previously released documents display in green. Documents that no longer belong to patient display in red

data.name: addpatient.header.info
data.value: Find a patient by performing a search. Once you have found a patient and have determined you have chosen the correct patient and are finished, click the Add Patient && Close button. If you have found the correct patient and wish to add more patients, click Add Patient && Continue. Click Cancel if you wish to return to the request without selecting a patient. Please note: A new request cannot be saved without a patient.

data.name: vieweditpatient.header.info
data.value: Below is the patient’s profile information. Review and/or modify the patient’s information. Please note: a change made in this view will globally update the patient’s information. Click Save to save any changes for this patient. Click Revert to discard any changes since the last save. Click Close to close this dialog.

data.name: changerequestor.header.info
data.value: Find a requestor by performing a search. Once you have found a requestor and have determined you have chosen the correct requestor, click the Select Requestor for Request button. Click Cancel if you wish to return to the request without changing the requestor. Please note: If you change from a requestor type of Non-Patient to Patient or from one Patient Requestor to another Patient Requestor all patients previously added to the request will be removed.

data.name: changerequestor.header.title
data.value: Change the Requestor for this Request

data.name: vieweditrequestor.header.info
data.value: Below is the requestor’s profile information. Review and/or modify the requestor’s information. Please note: a change made in this view will globally update the requestor’s information. Click Save to save any changes for this requestor. Click Revert to discard any changes since the last save. Click Close to close this dialog.

data.name: NoDocumentsReleasedDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to complete this request but no documents have been released. The status cannot be set to complete until documents have been released.
data.comment: Change Request Status - No Documents Released Dialog

data.name: NoDocumentsReleasedDialog.OkButton
data.comment: Change Request Status - No Documents Released Dialog

data.name: NoDocumentsReleasedDialog.Title
data.comment: Change Request Status - No Documents Released Dialog

data.name: PartiallyReleasedDialog.CancelButton
data.comment: Change Request Status - Partially Released Dialog

data.name: PartiallyReleasedDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to complete this request but there are documents selected for released that have not been released. Do you wish to continue with complete as the status?
data.comment: Change Request Status - Partially Released Dialog

data.name: PartiallyReleasedDialog.OkButton
data.comment: Change Request Status - Partially Released Dialog

data.name: PartiallyReleasedDialog.Title
data.comment: Change Request Status - Partially Released Dialog

data.name: PatientWithoutReleaseDialog.CancelButton
data.comment: Change Request Status - Patient Without Release Dialog

data.name: PatientWithoutReleaseDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to complete this request but there are patient(s) added to this request who do not have documents that have been released. Do you wish to continue with complete as the status?
data.comment: Change Request Status - Patient Without Release Dialog

data.name: PatientWithoutReleaseDialog.OkButton
data.comment: Change Request Status - Patient Without Release Dialog

data.name: PatientWithoutReleaseDialog.Title
data.comment: Change Request Status - Patient Without Release Dialog

data.name: reminderLabel.ChangeRequestStatusUI
data.value: Reminder: You must generate a letter for the selected status.

data.name: findRequest.header.info
data.value: To find a request, enter search criteria into the fields below and click the Find / Create Request button. To create a new request, click the New Request button. If you choose to search by patient data, each field you use requires at least 3 characters, except first and last name, which require a minimum combination of 3 characters. If you choose to search by non-patient data, each field you use requires at least 2 characters except for Invoice number and Request ID. Invoice number and Request ID fields need only one character. Enter exact invoice number to find a request by Invoice number. Enter exact Request ID to find request by Request ID.

data.name: messageRequestLabel
data.value: To view or modify a request, select a request in the grid below by double-clicking or by clicking the View / Edit Request button.

data.name: searchCountLabel.moreRequestFound
data.value: More than 500 requests found. Only the first 500 will display. Narrow the results by changing the filter criteria.

data.name: DiscardChangesDialog.Message
data.value: Data has been changed and has not been saved. Changes made will be lost if you proceed. Do you want to proceed?

data.name: requesteventhistory.header.info
data.value: The event history for the selected request is displayed below. All of the events are displayed upon initial entry; however the listing may be filtered to narrow the events displayed. Filter by event, originator, or date.

data.name: patient.requesthistory.header.info
data.value: Select a request in the grid below by double-clicking or by clicking the View / Edit Request button to go directly to that request in Requests tab. Click the Set/Update button to filter the requests by the selected encounter(s).

data.name: requestor.requesthistory.header.info
data.value: Select a request in the grid below by double-clicking or by clicking the View / Edit Request button to go directly to that request in the Requests tab.

data.name: releaseHistory.header.info
data.value: The release history for the selected request is displayed below. All of the releases are displayed upon initial entry; however the listing may be filtered to narrow the events displayed. Filter by Patient Name, User Name, and/or Date.

data.name: configureNotes.header.info
data.value: Select Create New to add a new note. Select Delete to delete the selected note. To update a note select it and enter changes and then select Save.

data.name: ssnmasking.header.info
data.value: Check the checkbox if you wish to mask online occurrences of SSN. Uncheck it if you wish to display the actual SSNs.

data.name: configuredefaultunbillablerequest.header.info
data.value: Check the checkbox if you wish to release the request as unbillable. Uncheck it if you wish to release the request as billable.

data.name: configuredefaultunbillablerequest.header.title
data.value: Other Maintenance : Configure Default Unbillable Request

data.name: NonDeletedPatientDialog.Message
data.value: You have requested to delete a patient that has already been included on a request. This patient cannot be deleted. If this is the wrong patient, see help to learn how patient can be merged.

data.name: NonDeletedRequestorDialog.Message
data.value: You have requested to delete a requestor that has already been included on a request. This requestor cannot be deleted.

data.name: searchCountLabel.FindRequestListUI.norequestFound
data.value: No requests found matching the selected criteria.

data.name: billingPayment.header.newinfo
data.value: Enter billing, shipping, fees, adjustments, and payments pertaining to this request. Click Save to save any changes. Click Release && Invoice to release any selected documents for this request. Click Pre-Bill to create a pre-bill.

data.name: populateAddressLabel
data.value: Populate Shipping Address for the Requestor's:

data.name: webUrlLabel1
data.value: Go to {0} and enter the shipping

data.name: webUrlLabel2
data.value: weight to calculate the shipping charges.

data.name: billingPayment.header.editinfo
data.value: Review and/or modify billing, shipping, sales tax, fees, adjustments, and payments pertaining to this request. Choose a billing location to apply sales tax. Click Add Payments or Add Adjustments to apply payments to open invoices. Release documents and generate an invoice by selecting the Release && Invoice button, or select Pre-Bill to generate a Pre-Bill to send to the customer.

data.name: chargehistory.header.info
data.value: Charge history for all releases (successful and not currently pending) for the request.

data.name: Invoice.header.info
data.value: Select a template to create an invoice. You may also select notes to add to the invoice or create your own note(s). Once finished, select Continue to view a preview of the invoice and output the invoice if desired. Click Cancel to return to Release && Invoice.

data.name: Invoice.header.title
data.value: Create an Invoice for the Request

data.name: PreBill.header.info
data.value: Select a template to create a pre-bill. You may also select notes to add to the pre-bill or create your own note(s). Once finished, select Continue to view a preview of the pre-bill and output the Pre-Bill if desired. Click Cancel to return to Release && Invoice.

data.name: PreBill.header.title
data.value: Create a Pre-Bill for the Request

data.name: MUReleaseTurnaroundTimeReport
data.value: ROI - Meaningful Use Release Turn Around Times Report

data.name: MUReleaseTurnaroundTimeReport.Header
data.value: ROI - Meaningful Use Release Turn Around Times Report

data.name: RequestWithLoggedStatus
data.value: ROI - Requests with Logged Status Report

data.name: noPaymentMethodMessageLabel
data.value: No payment methods exist. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.

data.name: DeleteCustomFeeDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to delete this custom fee. Do you wish to continue?

data.name: invoicehistory.header.info
data.value: The invoice history for the selected request is displayed below. All invoices are displayed upon initial entry. Sort by invoice date, invoice type, invoice number, or invoice creator. You may view an invoice to review and/or output it.

data.name: Invoice.MessageText
data.value: No template exists to create an invoice. Please contact your system administrator for help.

data.name: PreBill.MessageText
data.value: No template exists to create a pre-bill. Please contact your system administrator for help.

data.name: warningDialog.warningMessage
data.value: No user activity detected. An automatic logoff will occur in {0} seconds. Unsaved changes will be lost. Click OK to return to the application.

data.name: letters.header.info
data.value: Select a letter type from the dropdown below to create a letter for the selected request. If the selected letter has notes enabled, you will be able to select predefined notes to add as well as create custom notes to add to the letter if desired.

data.name: notesHeaderLabel.LetterInfoUI
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the selected Letter:

data.name: headerLabel.LogOnUI
data.value: Enter user ID and password to log on

data.name: CoverLetter.MessageText
data.value: A cover letter template has not been created; therefore you will not be able to create a cover letter. Please speak to your administrator for assistance.

data.name: Other.MessageText
data.value: No letter template has been created; therefore you will not be able to create a letter. Please speak to your administrator for assistance.

data.name: changepasswordsuccess.message
data.value: Your password has been successfully updated.

data.name: DocumentsReleasedByMRN
data.value: ROI - Documents Release by MRN Report

data.name: OverrideRequestInfoDialog.Message
data.value: You changed the requestor’s information. Do you want to update the corresponding information on the request?

data.name: duplicateRecordsDialog.Message
data.value: Some of the selected record(s) have already been added to the request to be released and cannot be added again.

data.name: coverLetterHeaderLabel.ReleaseDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the Cover Letter:

data.name: headerLabel.ReleaseDialog
data.value: If you wish to add a cover letter and/or invoice for this release, check to add the type of letter and then select a template from the dropdown. If the selected letter has notes enabled, you will be able to select predefined notes to add as well as create custom notes to add to the letter if desired. Once completed, select Continue to proceed with the release process. If letters have been added, you will first view a preview of the letters before continuing with the release process.

data.name: invoiceHeaderLabel.ReleaseDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the Invoice:

data.name: ReleaseDialog.header.info
data.value: {0} pages have been selected for release.

data.name: statusLabel.ReleaseDialog
data.value: The status for this request is not "complete", do you want to update the status to complete upon successful release of documents:

data.name: OutputPropertiesDialog.Fax.headerInfoLabel
data.value: Set the fax properties for the selected job and then click OK.

data.name: OutputPropertiesDialog.File.headerInfoLabel1
data.value: Set the file properties for the selected job and then click OK.

data.name: OutputPropertiesDialog.Print.headerInfoLabel
data.value: Set the print properties for the selected job and then click OK.

data.name: PreviouslyReleasedDialog.Message
data.value: Previously released documents cannot be removed.

data.name: CustomShippingAddressDialog.Message
data.value: Changes have been made to the address. Please select one of the following to proceed: "Request Instance Only" - Updates address only for this request "Request and Requestor Profile" - Updates address for both request and requestor profile "Cancel" - Will not save any changes

data.name: coverLetterMessageLabel.ReleaseDialog
data.value: A cover letter template has not been created; therefore you will not be able to add a cover letter for this release. Please speak to your administrator for assistance.

data.name: invoiceMessageLabel.ReleaseDialog
data.value: An invoice template has not been created; therefore you will not be able to add an invoice for this release. Please speak to your administrator for assistance.

data.name: reportFees.Info
data.value: Patient is allowed to receive one annual report free of charge. Any additional reports may incur in a fee. \n\nImportant: Patient must be informed of fee prior to disclosing the information.

data.name: patientGridInfoLabel.AccountingDisclosure
data.value: Select a patient from the list below by double-clicking a name or by selecting the name and clicking the 'OK' button. You can only select one patient at a time.

data.name: ReleaseDialog.header.info.single
data.value: {0} page has been selected for release.

data.name: patientMatchingDialogUI.Header.Title
data.value: Create New Request with Patient Requestor

data.name: createNewPatientRequestor.header.info
data.value: You have opted to create a new requestor with the selected patient requesting their records. In order to proceed, select the patient record you wish to use to create the new requestor and select the Select Patient as Requestor button. Once selected, you will be taken to the Requests tab and a new request will be created with the selected patient as both the requestor and patient. You will be able to modify the requestor’s information as well as modify the patient records for the request. If you do not wish to proceed, select Cancel to return to the Patients tab.

data.name: createNewPatientRequestor.header.title
data.value: Create a New Patient Requestor with the Selected Patient

data.name: createNewPatientRequestor.info
data.value: You have selected the following patient record(s) to create a new requestor. Please select the patient record you wish to use as the Patient Requestor.

data.name: copyRightInfoLabel
data.value: Copyright © 2018 Hyland Software, Inc. and/or one of its subsidiaries. All Rights Reserved. Use of this documentation and related software is governed by a license agreement. This documentation and related software contain confidential, proprietary and trade secret information of Hyland Software Solutions and are protected under United States and international copyright and other intellectual property laws. Use, disclosure, reproduction, modification, distribution, or storage in a retrieval system in any form or by any means is prohibited without the prior express written permission of Hyland Software Solutions. This documentation and related software are subject to change without notice. United States Government Rights: Use, duplication or disclosure by the U.S. Government is subject set forth in the Hyland Software Solutions license agreement and as provided in DFARS 227.7202-1(a) and 227.7202-3(a) (1995), DFARS 252.227-7013(c)(1)(ii) (OCT 1988), FAR 12.212(a) (1995), FAR 52.227-19, or FAR 52.227-14 (ALT III), as applicable. Manufacturer is listed below. Unpublished rights are reserved under the copyright laws of the United States.

data.name: tradeMarkInfoLabel
data.value: OneContent Patient Folder Manager is a registered trademark of Hyland Software Solutions LLC. All other product and company names may be trademarks or registered trademarks of their respective companies.

data.name: filedialog.MessageText
data.value: The request release cannot be saved to a file because you do not have access to a FILE output queue. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.

data.name: filedialog.title
data.value: Save as File Cannot be Completed

data.name: EncounterDetailDialogUI.header.info
data.value: Below is a list of all encounters for the selected patient.

data.name: DeleteRateTierDialog.Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected rate tier?

data.name: encounterCustomField
data.value: You are not authorized to view custom fields of an encounter

data.name: RequestCommentInfoUI.Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to save the Comment.

data.name: fileExists
data.value: File with the same name already exists

data.name: webUrlLabel
data.value: Go to {0} and enter the shipping weight to calculate the shipping charges.

data.name: errorTextLabel.dobTextBox
data.value: Date of birth requires an additional search field.

data.name: errorTextLabel.facilityComboBox
data.value: Facility requires an additional search field.

data.name: Reports.findPatient.header.info
data.value: To find a patient, enter search criteria into the fields below and click the Find Patient button. Search fields require at least three characters except first and last name which require a minimum combination of 3 characters.

data.name: RecordViewDialog.Message
data.value: You do not have any record views assigned to your user profile. Please contact your system administrator to obtain access.

data.name: LockedPermissionDialog.Message
data.value: One or more patients in this request are locked patients'. You do not have permission to view Locked patients' information or records. Please contact your system administrator.

data.name: LockedPermissionDialog.Title
data.value: No permission to Locked patient information

data.name: VipLockedPermissionDialog.Message
data.value: One or more patients in this request are VIP and/or Locked patients’. You do not have permission to view VIP and/or Locked patients’ information or records. Please contact your system administrator.
data.comment: User doesn't have Vip / locked permission

data.name: VipLockedPermissionDialog.OkButton
data.comment: User doesn't have vip / locked permission

data.name: VipLockedPermissionDialog.Title
data.comment: User doesn't have vip / locked permission

data.name: letterUnsuccessfulDialog.MessageText
data.value: The creation of the selected letter has failed due to a system error. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.

data.name: releaseUnsuccessfulDialog.MessageText
data.value: The release of documents has failed due to a system error. Please contact your system administrator for assistance

data.name: InactiveRequestorDialog.Message
data.value: No action can be performed on request since it is been associated with inactive requestor. You have to make the requestor active in order to perform any action on the request.

data.name: resenddialog.message
data.value: Select only documents released (green) for re-release or resend operation or Select documents unreleased (black) for release operation.

data.name: removedeletedpagesdialog.message
data.value: You have one or more documents included in the the request that no longer belong to this patient or have been deleted. They are flagged in red, please manually remove or uncheck from the request so that it can be saved/released.

data.name: PatientRecordInUseDialog.Message
data.value: This Patient record is currently in use by another user. Please refresh and try again to be able to make and save changes.

data.name: RequestorRecordInUseDialog.Message
data.value: This Requestor record is currently in use by another user. Please refresh and try again to be able to make and save changes.

data.name: EncounterDialog.header.info
data.value: Only the details of MPF encounters can be displayed. Encounter details are not available for Global documents, Attachments and Non-MPF documents.

data.name: CancelDeniedRequestDialog.Message
data.value: No operation can be performed on requests that are in denied or canceled status except for letter generation and status change.

data.name: createPatientRequestor.header.info
data.value: You have opted to create a new requestor with the selected patient. In order to proceed, select the patient record you wish to use to create the new requestor and select the Select Patient as Requestor button. Once selected, you will be taken to the Requests tab and a new request will be created with the selected patient as both the requestor and patient. You will be able to modify the requestor’s information as well as modify the patient records for the request. If you do not wish to proceed, select Cancel to return to the Request tab.

data.name: createPatientRequestor.header.title
data.value: Create a New Patient Requestor with the Selected Patient

data.name: createPatientRequestor.info
data.value: Please select the patient record you wish to use as the Patient Requestor.

data.name: createPatientRequestor.titlebar.title
data.value: Select a Patient to Create New Patient Requestor

data.name: NoPatientMatchingDialog.Message
data.value: Please enter data into other patient requestor search fields to be able to perform an existing patient match. Upon performing the patient match, you will be able to select a patient from the matching set and create a new requestor.

data.name: NoPatientMatchingDialog.Title
data.comment: Patient Matching cannot be performed - CR 316509

data.name: PatientVipLockedPermissionDialog.Message
data.value: You do not have permissions to view information related to VIP and/or Locked encounters for this patient. Please contact your system administrator to get access to the VIP and/or Locked encounters.

data.name: PatientVipLockedPermissionDialog.Title
data.value: Encounters with VIP and/or Locked status

data.name: pickAccountUI.header.info
data.value: Select the MPF account you want to use.

data.name: NoSelfMappingUI.Message
data.value:
Login Failure. Your Directory Services account is not mapped to an MPF Account.
Please contact your MPF administrator.

data.name: selfMappingUI.header.info
data.value: You need to map at least one MPF account to your directory services account in order to login to MPF.

data.name: ExitSelfMappingUI.Message
data.value:
You need to map at least one MPF account to your Directory Services account in order to login to MPF.
Are you sure you want to Exit?

data.name: SuccessSelfMapping.Message
data.value: If you have any more MPF accounts, please map them at this time.

data.name: attachment.edit.header.info
data.value: To edit an Attachment, update attachment details. Click Save to save any changes.

data.name: AttachmentErrorDialog.Message
data.value: You have requested to view one or more Attachments in the system viewer. Attachments cannot be viewed in the system viewer.

data.name: AttachmentErrorDialog.Title
data.value: Attachments cannot display in the Viewer

data.name: attachment.create.header.info
data.value: To create an Attachment all required fields must contain a value other than “Select.” Optionally enter an Encounter or Account Number and comment and click Save.

data.name: attachment.header.info
data.value: Configure the attachment storage location. If making a change, ensure prior attachment locations remain available so users may continue to access previously uploaded attachments.

data.name: ccrAttachInstructions
data.value: Attachment File: You must select at least one file to upload.

data.name: HpfAttachmentsErrorDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to view one or more MPF documents along with one or more attachments. MPF documents cannot be viewed concurrently with attachments. The system will now display only the MPF document(s) you selected.

data.name: HpfAttachmentsErrorDialog.Title
data.value: Attachments cannot be viewed concurrently with MPF Documents

data.name: HpfNonHpfAttachmentsErrorDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to view one or more non-MPF documents, one or more attachments, and one or more MPF documents. Non-MPF documents are not stored electronically and cannot be viewed. MPF documents cannot be viewed concurrently with attachments. The system will now display only the MPF document(s) you selected.

data.name: HpfNonHpfAttachmentsErrorDialog.Title
data.value: Attachments cannot be viewed concurrently with MPF Documents

data.name: HpfNonHpfErrorDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to view one or more non-MPF documents and one or more MPF documents. Non-MPF documents are not stored electronically and cannot be viewed. The system will now display only the MPF document(s) you selected.

data.name: HpfNonHpfErrorDialog.Title
data.value: Non-MPF Documents cannot display in the viewer

data.name: NonHpfAttachmentErrorDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to view one or more non-MPF documents and an attachment. Non-MPF documents are not stored electronically and cannot be viewed. The system will now display only the attachment you selected.

data.name: NonHpfAttachmentErrorDialog.Title
data.value: Non-MPF Documents cannot display in the viewer

data.name: NonHpfAttachmentsErrorDialog.Message
data.value: You have selected to view one or more non-MPF documents and more than one attachment. Non-MPF documents are not stored electronically and cannot be viewed. Furthermore, the system may only display one attachment at a time. Revise your selection to include either one or more MPF documents or a single attachment and try again.

data.name: NonHpfAttachmentsErrorDialog.Title
data.value: Non-MPF Documents cannot display in the viewer

data.name: deletedAttachment.Message
data.value: One or more of the selected attachment(s) have been deleted and cannot be added to the request.

data.name: attachmentConfigWarning
data.value: If making a change, ensure prior attachment locations remain available so users may continue to access previously uploaded attachments.

data.name: salestaxperfacility.header.info
data.value: To create a new billing location select Create New. To make edits to a billing location, select an existing billing location and modify the data. Select billing location from the list. Enter the sales tax percentage. Billing location will be used for associating sales tax and invoice at the time of request billing.

data.name: externalsources.header.info
data.value: Select a configuration to edit. System Name and Description will change the displayed source name and description in ROI. Editing any other field may cause problems communicating with the external source. Select Test to test the connection settings. Select Cancel to undo any changes.

data.name: emaildialog.MessageText
data.value: The request release cannot be EMAILED because you do not have access to an EMAIL output queue. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.

data.name: TestConnectionDialog.FailureMessageText
data.value: Connection Failed.Please check the connection properties

data.name: turnaroundtime.header.info
data.value: Configure each day as a Business Day or a Weekend Day. Only Days configured as Business Days will count towards reporting metrics.

data.name: findOverDueInvoice.header.info
data.value: To find overdue invoices, enter search criteria into the fields below and click the Search button. Select at least one Facility and create a Days Overdue range to search. Use the Days Overdue slider to create a range of days overdue or enter a range in the start/end field. Use the Reset button to clear all fields.

data.name: invoiceMessageLabel
data.value: Select the invoice from list below by double-clicking or by clicking the View Highlighted button.

data.name: searchCountLabel.moreOverDueInvoiceFound
data.value: More than 500 invoices found. Only the first 500 will display. Narrow the results by changing the filter criteria and searching again.

data.name: searchCountLabel.noOverDueInvoiceFound
data.value: No results found matching the selected criteria.

data.name: OutputInvoiceDialog.header.info.single
data.value: {0} document has been selected for output.

data.name: headerLabel.OutputInvoiceDialog
data.value: Choose Output Invoice(s) above to include a copy of the original invoice. Output Statements is selected below with the default template selected. The oldest invoice selected in the Overdue Invoice screen was used to set the statement Date Range. You can override the Template and Date Range. If the selected template has notes enabled, you will be able to select pre-defined notes as well as create custom notes to add if desired. Once completed, select Preview Before Output to view a single preview of the Statement(s)/Invoice(s). Select Save to save the Statement(s)/Invoice(s). Select Print to print the Statement(s)/Invoice(s).

data.name: requestorLetterHeaderLabel.OutputInvoiceDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the Invoice:

data.name: invoiceHeaderLabel.OutputInvoiceDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the Invoice:

data.name: OutputInvoiceDialog.requestorCountLabel
data.value: {0} requestor(s) are associated with this output

data.name: requestor.letterhistory.header.info
data.value: The Requestor Letter history for the selected requestor is displayed below. All Requestor Letters are displayed upon initial entry. Sort by date created or date resent, output method, letter creator, or template used. Select a Requestor Letter and click View to review the letter and Print, Fax, Email, or Save the letter.

data.name: salesTaxRequestTotalLabel.ChargeHistoryUI
data.comment: Charge History Sales Tax Charge Total

data.name: configurecountry.header.info
data.value: Select the default country for addresses throughout ROI

data.name: requestor.accountmanagement.header.info
data.value: View the Account Register for the selected Requestor. Double-click a row in the register to view more information about the item. Use the Payments and Adjustments buttons to enter new payments and adjustments. Use the Statements button to generate an account statement. If the Account Balance is less than $0.00 use the Refund button to issue a refund. Maximum of 1000 invoices shown.

data.name: AppliedAmount.Message
data.value: Applied amount should not exceed the unapplied amount

data.name: TotalAppliedAmount.Message
data.value: Total applied amount should not exceed the payment amount
data.comment: Total applied amount should not exceed

data.name: TotalAppliedAmount.OkButton
data.comment: Total applied amount should not exceed

data.name: TotalAppliedAmount.Title
data.comment: Total applied amount should not exceed

data.name: BalanceAmount.Message
data.value: Applied amount should not exceed the invoice balance amount

data.name: exceedsTotal.Message
data.value: The total applied invoice amount exceeds total adjustment amount

data.name: Feetype.Message
data.value: Please Verify Fee Type and Amount

data.name: greaterThanAvailable.Message
data.value: Applied Amount greater than Available Amount

data.name: greaterThanTotal.Message
data.value: Applied Amount greater than Total Balance

data.name: lessThanZero.Message
data.value: Applied Amount can not be lesser than zero

data.name: lesserBalance.Message
data.value: Balance Amount is lesser than Applied Amount

data.name: statementHeaderLabel.StatementDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the invoice:

data.name: headerLabel.StatementDialog
data.value: Select Statements to output for the selected requestor's account. Select a template and a date range for the statement. Select Add Invoices to output existing inovices then select the individual invoices to output

data.name: RestrictedFacilityLabel
data.comment: User does not have facility permission

data.name: statementHeaderLabel.ReleaseDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the Invoice:

data.name: requestorLetterMessageLabel.OutputInvoiceDialog
data.value: A requestor letter template has not been created; therefore you will not be able to add a requestor letter for this release. Please speak to your administrator for assistance.

data.name: statementMessageLabel.ReleaseDialog
data.value: A requestor letter template has not been created; therefore you will not be able to add a requestor letter for this release. Please speak to your administrator for assistance.

data.name: statementMessageLabel.StatementDialog
data.value: A requestor letter template has not been created; therefore you will not be able to add a requestor letter for this release. Please speak to your administrator for assistance.

data.name: accounthistory.header.info
data.value: View the Account History for the selected Requestor. PreBills, Invoices, and statements are shown below along with information about each. Select the View button or double- click an entry to view or output the PreBill, Invoice or Statement.

data.name: RefundAmount.Message
data.value: Refund amount cannot exceed the requestor's total unapplied payments.

data.name: RequestorAccountBalance.Message
data.value: Requestor account balance should be less than zero to refund.

data.name: textlabel1.UnappliedAdjustmentUI
data.value: Requestors account includes unapplied adjustments and/or payments. Do you want to apply adjustments/payments to this invoice ?

data.name: headerLabel.OutputRefundDialog
data.value: Select Output Refund Letter and/or Statement to generate a letter. Select the desired template and add notes to the letter. Select Print to print the letters or save to save the file.

data.name: refundLetterHeaderLabel.OutputRefundDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the Letter

data.name: refundLetterMessageLabel.OutputRefundDialog
data.value: A refund letter template has not been created; therefore you will not be able to add a refund letter for this release. Please speak to your administrator for assistance.

data.name: statementLetterHeaderLabel.OutputRefundDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to add to the Statement

data.name: OutputRefundDialog.refundLetterCountLabel
data.value: {0} letter(s) have been selected for output

data.name: releaseOnlyNonHPFDocumentLabel.OutputDiscDialog
data.value: This release contains only Non-MPF documents. No documents will be output.

data.name: createNotesLabel.OutputDiscDialog
data.value: Select/Create Notes to Add to Label:

data.name: notesLabel.OutputDiscDialog
data.value: *notes will only show on labels with notes configured

data.name: discdialog.MessageText
data.value: The request release cannot be written to DISC because you do not have access to a DISC output queue. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.

data.name: faxdialog.MessageText
data.value: The request release cannot be FAXED because you do not have access to a FAX output queue. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.

data.name: printdialog.MessageText
data.value: The request release cannot be PRINTED because you do not have access to a PRINT output queue. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.

data.name: MonitorOutputJobIE11NotSupported.Message
data.value: This feature is not supported in Internet Explorer 11. If you have Internet Explorer 11 installed, then please open the One Content application and check the status of the submitted jobs by clicking Current User > Monitor Jobs.
data.comment: No support for Monitor Jobs for IE11
